data.title: A whale sold 2.18 million FARTCOIN today, worth $2.3 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Lookonchain monitoring shows that whale 73FtSU sold 2.18 million FARTCOIN purchased 2 months ago at an average price of $1.06 today, worth $2.3 million, with a profit of about $251,000.

data.title: Jupiter DAO: Voting will be suspended until the end of 2025 to focus on products and community
data.description: Jupiter DAO officially announced on X that it will suspend voting until the end of 2025 to focus on developing Jupiter products and the community. Active Staking Rewards (ASR) will be extended to the end of 2025, and all stakers will receive rewards.

data.title: LayerZero has launched a second referendum on whether to turn on the "fee switch"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News LayerZero has launched a second referendum on whether to turn on the "fee switch". The vote will decide whether to activate the LayerZero protocol fee, which will be used to repurchase ZRO and destroy it. The vote will end on June 27.

data.title: Revolut Explores Launching Its Own Stablecoin Amid Regulatory Changes
data.description: According to PANews, London-based neobank Revolut is actively exploring the issuance of its own stablecoin. Sources familiar with the matter have revealed that Revolut is in discussions with at least one crypto-native company. In recent years, as regulatory environments in the United States and globally have evolved, an increasing number of non-crypto companies are considering the issuance of stablecoins. Revolut currently serves over 55 million retail customers and 500,000 business clients across 160 countries.

data.title: Semler Scientific Sets Ambitious Bitcoin Reserve Goals for 2025
data.description:
According to PANews, Semler Scientific, a publicly traded U.S. company, has appointed Joe Burnett as the Director of Bitcoin Strategy. The company has outlined ambitious targets for its Bitcoin reserves over the next three years. By the end of 2025, Semler Scientific aims to hold at least 10,000 Bitcoins, increasing to 42,000 by the end of 2026, and reaching 105,000 by the end of 2027. The company plans to achieve these goals through equity, debt financing, and operational cash flow.

Eric Semler, the Chairman of Semler Scientific, expressed confidence that Burnett's appointment will support the company's long-term Bitcoin strategy. Since adopting Bitcoin as its primary reserve asset in 2024, Semler Scientific has achieved approximately a 287% return on its Bitcoin investments, resulting in a $177 million gain on its balance sheet.

data.title: Aave DAO has repurchased more than 50,000 AAVE so far, with an average price of $199.74 and a floating profit of $3 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Since the activation of the protocol fee repurchase mechanism, Aave DAO has continued to implement a weekly repurchase plan of $1 million. The latest data shows that the protocol has spent a total of $10 million to repurchase 50,000 AAVE, with an average cost price of $199.74. Based on the current market price of $264, this part of the treasury reserves has generated about $3 million in unrealized gains.

data.title: Semler Scientific plans Bitcoin holdings of 105,000 BTC by 2027
data.description:
Health tech firm Semler Scientific wants to boost its Bitcoin holdings from 3,800 BTC to 105,000 BTC by 2027 and has appointed a new director to lead the plan.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/semler-scientific-plans-105000-bitcoin-by-2027?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Investment institution Arca has withdrawn a total of 2.183 million PENDLE from Binance in the past 6 days
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin’s monitoring, investment institution Arca is suspected to have bought PENDLE again. In the past 6 days, the institution has withdrawn a total of 2.183 million PENDLE (US$8.31 million) from Binance at a price of about US$3.8. It is reported that the institution has actually made three PENDLE investments in the past year, with a loss of about US$960,000.

data.title: OpenAI phases out partnership with AI training data provider Scale AI
data.description: ChatGPT developer OpenAI is gradually ending its partnership with Scale AI, a core supplier of AI training data, after Meta announced that it would pay nearly $15 billion to acquire a 49% stake in Scale AI, making it the second largest acquisition in Meta's history. After Meta's investment, Scale AI CEO will join Meta's experimental AI project. OpenAI is turning to emerging suppliers such as Mercor for specialized data, and Google has also been exposed to reduce its cooperation with Scale AI due to concerns that competitors may obtain trade secrets. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: US intelligence official: If Fordow nuclear facility is attacked or Khamenei is assassinated, Iran may turn to nuclear weapons development
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Although Iran has stockpiled large amounts of enriched uranium that can be used to make nuclear bombs, U.S. intelligence officials said that intelligence agencies still believe that Iran has not made a final decision on whether to build nuclear weapons. This assessment has not changed since the intelligence agencies last assessed Iran's intentions in March this year-even though Israel has launched an attack on Iran's nuclear facilities. Senior U.S. intelligence officials said that if the U.S. military attacked Iran's Fordow uranium enrichment facility or Israel killed Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei, Iran's leaders might turn to nuclear weapons research and development. However, in the eyes of many Iran hawks in the United States and Israel, it does not matter whether Iran has decided to build a nuclear bomb. They believe that Tehran's nuclear capabilities are sufficient to pose an existential threat to Israel. This issue has long been a focus of the Iranian policy debate, and the debate has heated up again as Trump considers whether to bomb the Fordow nuclear facility. (The New York Times)

data.title: Trump extends grace period for TikTok's "Don't Sell or Ban" bill for another 90 days
data.description:
US President Trump has signed an executive order to extend the grace period for the implementation of TikTok's "no sale or ban" law for another 90 days.
In addition, TikTok posted on social platforms that the claim that TikTok's owners are buying TRUMP tokens is pure fabrication and extremely irresponsible.

data.title: Arizona Senate Passes Bitcoin Reserve Bill HB 2324
data.description: According to Odaily, the Arizona Senate has approved the Bitcoin Reserve Bill HB 2324 following a reconsideration motion, with a vote of 16-14. The bill has now been forwarded to the House of Representatives. This legislation permits the state of Arizona to utilize digital assets seized from criminal confiscations to establish a digital asset reserve.

data.title: Insider: Revolut is actively exploring issuing its own stablecoin
data.description: According to people familiar with the matter, digital bank Revolut is actively exploring the issuance of its own stablecoin, and the company has started cooperation negotiations with at least one crypto-native company. In recent years, with the changes in the regulatory environment in the United States and the world, more and more non-crypto companies have begun to consider issuing stablecoins. Revolut currently has more than 55 million retail customers and 500,000 corporate customers in 160 countries around the world. (Decrypt)

data.title: Trader AguilaTrades sets up a TWAP order and expects to increase his position by 2,000 BTC in 8 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Chain analyst Yu Jin Monitoring said that trader AguilaTrades continued to increase his position after opening the third BTC long position yesterday, and his BTC long position will increase to more than $250 million again at 3 pm.
AguilaTrades opened a TWAP (time-weighted average price) order at 7 am this morning and will add 2,000 BTC in the next 8 hours.
Currently, its Hyperliqud position is worth $76.92 million, with an opening price of $104,746.3 and a liquidation price of $74,102, with a floating loss of $40,000.

data.title: Trump Extends TikTok Sale Deadline by 90 Days
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump signed an executive order on June 19, extending the deadline for TikTok's sale by an additional 90 days. This decision delays the enforcement of the 'sell or ban' policy concerning the popular social media app.

In response to circulating rumors, TikTok clarified on social media that claims about its owners purchasing TRUMP tokens are entirely fabricated and irresponsible.

data.title: White House: Trump will decide within two weeks whether to take military action against Iran
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: On June 19, local time, the White House said on the Iranian issue that US President Trump will decide within two weeks whether to take military action against Iran.
US White House Press Secretary Levitt also said on the same day that the communication between the United States and Iran is still continuing. US President Trump said there is a "great" chance of negotiating with Iran.
The schedule released by the White House shows that US President Trump will listen to intelligence briefings from the National Security Council on the current conflict between Israel and Iran every day in the next few days. Trump meets with national security officials in the White House Situation Room every day to consider whether to join Israel's actions against Iran. (CCTV News)
